x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: License entitlement quantities are the baseline data Now Assist SAM uses to calculate license position and generate AI optimization recommendations. Without entitlement data, AI cannot determine over-licensing, under-licensing, or reclamation opportunities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaTotal.addQuery("active", true); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No active license entitlement records found", finding: "No active license entitlement records found. Now Assist SAM cannot perform AI license position analysis without entitlement data." }; } var gaRights = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaRights.addQuery("active", true); gaRights.addQuery("rights", ">", "0"); gaRights.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaRights.query(); var withRights = gaRights.next() ? parseInt(gaRights.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withRights / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities (" + withRights + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities populated. Now Assist SAM can perform accurate AI license position analysis." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI license position analysis will be incomplete." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities. Now Assist SAM cannot perform meaningful AI license position analysis without entitlement data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate the rights/entitlement quantity field on all active license records. Import license entitlement data from publisher contracts or procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses to update.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cd2
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[License entitlement quantities are the baseline data Now Assist SAM uses to calculate license position and generate AI optimization recommendations. Without entitlement data, AI cannot determine over-licensing, under-licensing, or reclamation opportunities.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>License Reconciliation Coverage</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaTotal.addQuery("active", true); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No active license entitlement records found", finding: "No active license entitlement records found. Now Assist SAM cannot perform AI license position analysis without entitlement data." }; } var gaRights = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaRights.addQuery("active", true); gaRights.addQuery("rights", ">", "0"); gaRights.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaRights.query(); var withRights = gaRights.next() ? parseInt(gaRights.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withRights / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities (" + withRights + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities populated. Now Assist SAM can perform accurate AI license position analysis." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI license position analysis will be incomplete." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have entitlement quantities. Now Assist SAM cannot perform meaningful AI license position analysis without entitlement data." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SAM</module> <number>CHK0006245</number> <order>300</order> <remediation_guidance>Populate the rights/entitlement quantity field on all active license records. Import license entitlement data from publisher contracts or procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses to update.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cd2</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
